goal: Phase 1 trigger-first revision-first local state model for Orun
notes: Task 0016 (M5.a `orun plan` rewire) verified PASS and merged on 2026-05-30. PR #161 squash-merged into main as commit 7a9c494 — `Task 0016: M5.a — orun plan rewire to revision-first layout`. orun plan now always resolves TriggerOccurrence via internal/triggerctx and persists via internal/revision.WriteRevision; metadata.trigger + metadata.revision embedded in plan.json; compat aliases under .orun/plans/ retained byte-identical; cli-surface.md §1.1 summary block (✓ Plan revision created / Revision / Trigger / Jobs / Path) emitted before the legacy detail line; -o/--output preserved as additive copy.

Coverage on PR #161 final: internal/statestore=95.7% (≥95% gate); internal/revision=90.4% (≥90% gate); internal/executionstate=90.0% (exact floor held — M5.a did not touch the package). All quality gates green: go build/vet, go test -race ./..., make test-state-redesign. Both required CI checks PASS at log level on final head SHA after verifier-side commit (Orun Plan run 26683860043; Harness dry-run guard run 26683860052).

M5.a closed cleanly: scope discipline held — only cmd/orun/main.go, internal/model/plan.go, internal/revision/legacy.go touched, plus tests + ai/ tracking. No edits to internal/runner / runbundle / state / executionstate. No spec drift; no proposals filed.

Next = **Task 0018 = M5.b implementer** per implementation-plan.md §M5.b. Scope: orun run rewire — resolve PlanRevision via internal/revision.ResolveRevision, materialize system.manual revision in-memory when none exists, create execution via internal/executionstate.CreateExecution, hook runner snapshot stream into Bridge.MirrorRunnerOutput, add --revision flag (skips resolution chain). Pin bridge-mirror-failed payload schema in data-model.md §9 before any second consumer. Scope EXCLUDES orun status/logs/describe (M5.c) and hidden orun state migrate (M5.d).

Risk Notes carried forward: (a) bridge-mirror-failed payload schema STILL un-pinned in data-model.md §9 — must pin in M5.b before any second consumer. (b) MirrorModeHardlink debug-fold decision deferred to M6. (c) emitFailure best-effort dropped events — M5.b should add stderr/metric fallback. (d) Event-sequence retry budget of 32 acceptable for single-writer Phase 1; re-evaluate when remote drivers come online. (e) internal/executionstate coverage at exact 90.0% floor — must not regress in M5.b/c/d.

Persistent local environment quirk (NOT a regression): kiox -- orun plan --changed --intent examples/intent.yaml occasionally fails on composition-cache resolution. Reproduces sporadically on main. CI is authoritative.
